lesson.title: 1.5 Physical Fitness
activities: This lesson will help learners to develop physical fitness, coordination and focus which are
essential for both athletic performance and personal growth. It is number one (1) of the three (3)
muscular strength, cardiovascular endurance, flexibility, muscular endurance and body
